reason: Follow the merged request cap, execution order, evidence matrix, and defect classification rules.
Preserve event-sourced runtime, async title, permission, persistence, verification, and release contracts if a source defect is confirmed.
Apply focused RED/GREEN and package verification requirements to any TUI source change.
Trace provider requests, tools, canonical events, projection, and PTY rendering without relying on model prose.
Use team-root events and replayed projection as mailbox/channel evidence.
Verify separate wakes, idle transitions, quiescence, and runaway budgets.
Verify the read-only child observation and single-input invariant.
